initial_draft:
```
<my name> Player RED </my name>
<my resources> X: 25, Y: 5 </my resources>
<my goals> Acquire as many resources as possible </my goals>
<reason> BLUE proposed 1 X for 3 Y. This is a good deal for me, as I have plenty of X and want more Y. Accepting this trade will significantly improve my resource position. This is my first accepted trade, and the game will end.</reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> That trade looks great, Player BLUE! I accept. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```

iterations.feedback:
```
<critique>
1. Format: OK. All tags are present and in the correct order. The proposed trade is also valid.
2. Payoff alignment: OK. Accepting this trade is excellent, as I have a surplus of X and desire Y. The 1:3 ratio is very favorable.
3. Opponent plausibility: OK. The opponent offered this trade, so it's very likely they'll accept my acceptance.
4. Consistency: OK. The reason clearly states why I'm accepting, and the message confirms this. There are no contradictions.
5. Rule compliance: OK. I have only made one proposal so far and am now accepting, respecting the proposal limit.
</critique>
```
